prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 105.7 kg; Height 177.9 cm; BMI 33.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 9.2%; 3 months ago 9.2%; current 9.4%), FPG (12 months ago 208mg/dL; 9 months ago 231mg/dL; 6 months ago 233mg/dL; 3 months ago 196mg/dL; current 237mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 104.1kg; 9 months ago 106.9kg; 6 months ago 107.7kg; 3 months ago 105.2kg; current 105.7kg), Height (12 months ago 177.9cm; 9 months ago 177.9cm; 6 months ago 177.9cm; 3 months ago 177.9cm; current 177.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 54U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 102U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 43mg/g; 9 months ago 48mg/g; 6 months ago 52mg/g; 3 months ago 55mg/g; current 47mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 51mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 188mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 177mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
